serverInfo.name: deep-work-plan-site
serverInfo.description: deepworkplan.com — the Deep Work Plan methodology, specification, and kit. Read-only agent surface exposing the canonical /init adoption prompt and navigation to the methodology, spec, kit, and examples. Exposed in the browser via WebMCP (navigator.modelContext) on every page and documented via Agent Skills at /.well-known/agent-skills/index.json.

tools.name: get_init_prompt
tools.description: Return the canonical one-line instruction that makes any repository AI-first with Deep Work Plan (the /init.md adoption prompt).

tools.name: list_site_sections
tools.description: List the main sections of deepworkplan.com (methodology, specification, kit, examples, init) with their URLs.

tools.name: open_section
tools.description: Navigate the current browser tab to a section of deepworkplan.com (home, methodology, spec, kit, examples, or init).
